complaints-radisson/comp_1.title: Air Conditioner Noise
complaints-radisson/comp_1.description: Guest complained that the air conditioner hummed loudly during the night, interrupting sleep. Requested room move or urgent service.

updates.message: Assigned technician Savenaca to inspect unit.
Technician tightened housing brackets and balanced the fan. Noise successfully resolved.

complaints-ramada/comp_2.title: Delayed Airport Shuttle
complaints-ramada/comp_2.description: Guest missed their lunch booking due to the 11:30 AM airport shuttle arriving 25 minutes late because of local pipeline roadworks.

updates.message: Offered complimentary welcome mocktails and a $40 F&B voucher to apologize for the delay.
